user_stories.title: Hybrid Search Interface
user_stories.i_want_to: search the podcast database using natural language
user_stories.so_that: I can find relevant advice without needing exact keywords.
acceptance_criteria: System *also* performs keyword search (Postgres full-text search) for specific terms.

user_stories.title: Contextual Answer Generation
user_stories.i_want_to: receive a synthesized answer to my question
user_stories.so_that: I don't have to read raw transcripts to understand the concept.
acceptance_criteria: Retrieve related graph entities (e.g., if asking about 'Growth', pull in related 'Growth Experts').
Send context + user question to LLM to generate a natural language response.
